today_news.title: Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
today_news.summary: OpenAI has built an LLM super-hacker called GPT-Red that it uses as a sparring partner to help its other models boost their defenses against cyberattacks. Last week the company released the latest version of its flagship LLM, GPT-5.6. OpenAI says that training it against GPT-Red made the model its m...

today_news.title: Agentic orchestration: Enterprise AI organizations have a deployment problem, not a platform problem — and most are calling chatbots agents
today_news.summary: Across 101 enterprises, agent orchestration is consolidating onto model-provider platforms — Anthropic’s Claude leads by a wide margin — chosen for the gravity of the underlying model and judged on reliable multi-step execution. But the ambition runs well ahead of the reality: most deployed “agents”...

today_news.title: OpenAI is now using AI to attack its own AI, and it's working better than humans ever did
today_news.summary: OpenAI's internal GPT-Red model finds successful attacks in 84 percent of test scenarios through self-play training. Human red teamers manage just 13 percent. The results feed directly into hardening models like GPT-5.6 Sol.

today_news.title: GPT-5.6 Sol reportedly disproves a 30-year-old statistics conjecture in 90 minutes after humans couldn't crack it
today_news.summary: A University of Pennsylvania statistics professor used OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Pro to disprove a central open conjecture about the Benjamini-Hochberg method in roughly 90 minutes. The predecessor model, GPT-5.5, couldn't find a solution even after 20 hours. The answer combines known methods in a new wa...

today_news.title: Bonsai 27B is a full open reasoning model that fits on an iPhone
today_news.summary: PrismML has compressed a 27-billion-parameter AI model to under 4 GB, small enough to run on an iPhone. In the company's own benchmarks, the smallest version keeps 90 percent of the original performance, with math and coding scores barely affected. Apple is reportedly already testing the compression...

today_news.title: OpenAI's Codex now encrypts instructions between AI agents, leaving developers blind to internal delegation
today_news.summary: Since early June, OpenAI's coding tool Codex encrypts the instructions a main agent passes to its subagents. Developers can no longer track how tasks get delegated internally. For the larger GPT-5.6 variants Sol and Terra, the encryption is mandatory.

today_news.title: Spotify bets Premium subscribers want to chat with their music player
today_news.summary: Spotify is expanding its AI voice interface. Premium subscribers can now talk to or text the service directly inside the app.

today_tech.summary: Abstract: Sound event detection relies on frame-level strong labels whose annotation is expensive. Active learning addresses this problem by selecting the audio segments whose labels help the classifier most. today_tech.summary: Abstract: Self-supervision is a powerful technique for learning visual representations from unlabeled data. today_tech.summary: Abstract: Recent text-to-audio models generate high-quality audio, but often fail to follow instructions involving multiple sound events and temporal order.
